hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：美国、伊朗和以色列同意停火；【CRYPTO】美伊停火导致比特币、以太币和石油空头损失 4.27 亿美元。

items.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.summary_zh: Visa 的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大努力的一部分。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S., Iran and Israel Agree to Cease-Fire
items.summary: The deal came shortly before President Trump’s deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face devastation. Israel said the cease-fire did not include Lebanon.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国、伊朗和以色列同意停火
items.summary_zh: 该协议是在特朗普总统规定伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的最后期限前不久达成的，否则将面临毁灭。以色列表示，停火不包括黎巴嫩。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether, oil shorts lead $427 million wipeout on US-Iran ceasefire
items.summary: Short sellers betting on continued war escalation lost $427 million in 24 hours as bitcoin vaulted past $72,000 on the ceasefire announcement.
items.title_zh: 美伊停火导致比特币、以太币和石油空头损失 4.27 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 随着停火声明发布，比特币价格突破 72,000 美元，押注战争持续升级的卖空者在 24 小时内损失了 4.27 亿美元。

items.title: Bitcoin vaults past $72,000 as U.S. stock futures surge on a two‑week U.S.–Iran ceasefire
items.summary: Risk assets rose late Tuesday as oil collapsed after Trump and Iran confirmed the two-week ceasefire.
items.title_zh: 美国与伊朗停火两周，美国股指期货飙升，比特币突破 72,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 周二晚间，特朗普和伊朗确认停火两周后，油价暴跌，风险资产上涨。

items.title: Bitcoin jumps on US-Iran ceasefire talks, long-term rally remains uncertain: analyst
items.summary: One analyst noted that a full resolution is needed for the current upward momentum to be translated into a long-term bull cycle.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，美伊停火谈判推动比特币上涨，长期反弹仍不确定
items.summary_zh: 一位分析师指出，需要全面解决当前的上升势头才能转化为长期牛市周期。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
items.summary: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
items.summary_zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

items.title: GSR partners with SC Ventures-backed tokenization firm supporting its web3 ‘investment bank’ strategy
items.summary: By partnering with Libeara, GSR is positioning itself as a full-service, end-to-end, global digital asset and RWA capital markets partner.
items.title_zh: GSR 与 SC Ventures 支持的代币化公司合作，支持其 web3“投资银行”战略
items.summary_zh: 通过与 Libeara 合作，GSR 将自己定位为全方位服务、端到端、全球数字资产和 RWA 资本市场合作伙伴。

items.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
items.summary: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 另类华尔街研究公司表示，已派出一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。这是他们学到的
items.summary_zh: 在美国和以色列对伊朗发动战争之前，世界上大约 20% 的石油是通过狭窄的霍尔木兹海峡运输的。

items.title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
items.summary: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.
items.title_zh: 我们对美国和伊朗之间为期两周的停火了解多少
items.summary_zh: 临时休战是在美国和以色列对伊朗发动协同袭击一个多月后达成的。

items.title: Bitcoin rises past $69,000 as risk markets reverse big early losses on hope for Iran deal
items.summary: Iran's government is reportedly reviewing Pakistan's request for a two-week ceasefire positively, according to an Axios report.
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗协议的希望，风险市场扭转了早期的巨大损失，比特币涨至 69,000 美元以上
items.summary_zh: 据 Axios 报道，伊朗政府正在积极审查巴基斯坦提出的为期两周停火的请求。

items.title: Fox to integrate Kalshi data in news broadcasts, sports ‘maybe’ in the future
items.summary: Kalshi said that although sports data will not initially be part of the Fox deal, it may become part of the partnership in the future.
items.title_zh: 福克斯未来可能会将卡尔希数据整合到新闻广播和体育赛事中
items.summary_zh: 卡尔希表示，虽然体育数据最初不会成为福克斯交易的一部分，但未来可能会成为合作伙伴关系的一部分。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.summary: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.title_zh: 在要求水平过高后，Blue Owl 将私人信贷基金赎回上限限制在 5%
items.summary_zh: Blue Owl 将高于平常的请求归因于“市场对人工智能相关软件公司中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
items.summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特称伊朗炸弹将使核灾难更难以避免
items.summary_zh: 这位伯克希尔哈撒韦公司董事长表示，越来越多的核武器国家从根本上改变了全球风险格局。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he's still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags 'tiny' new buy
items.summary: The 95-year-old investor said he still comes into the office daily and stays engaged with markets.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他仍在呼吁伯克希尔的投资，并表示“小规模”新收购
items.summary_zh: 这位 95 岁的投资者表示，他仍然每天来到办公室并与市场保持联系。

items.title: Warren Buffett teams up with NBA superstar Stephen Curry for charity lunch, reviving iconic auction
items.summary: The winning bidder — along with up to seven guests — will join Buffett and the Currys for an exclusive lunch in Omaha, Nebraska.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特与 NBA 巨星斯蒂芬·库里合作举办慈善午餐，复兴标志性拍卖
items.summary_zh: 中标者以及最多七位客人将在内布拉斯加州奥马哈与巴菲特和库里家族一起享用独家午餐。

items.title: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
items.summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.
items.title_zh: 三大利基商品价格大幅上涨。它们显示了中国对供应链的控制
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争后，用于国防的关键元件和推动人工智能进步的半导体的价格飙升。

items.title: Iran ceasefire deal a partial win for Trump - but at a high cost
items.summary: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.
items.title_zh: 伊朗停火协议是特朗普的部分胜利——但代价高昂
items.summary_zh: 与伊朗达成为期两周的停火的道路可能从根本上改变了世界其他国家对美国的看法。

items.title: Oil plunges after US-Iran ceasefire deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The agreement was announced not long before Trump's Tuesday evening deadline was reached.
items.title_zh: 美伊停火协议重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后油价暴跌
items.summary_zh: 该协议是在特朗普周二晚上的最后期限到来之前不久宣布的。

items.title: Pakistan Says It Hit a Military Target. Investigations Suggest It Was a Rehab Center.
items.summary: After the deadliest attack in Afghanistan since the Taliban took over, families searched among photos and remains for signs of their relatives.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦称其击中军事目标。调查表明这是一个康复中心。
items.summary_zh: 阿富汗发生自塔利班接管以来最严重的袭击事件后，家人在照片和遗骸中寻找亲人的踪迹。

items.title: ‘I Love Viktor’: Trump and Vance Cheer on Orban in Hungarian Race
items.summary: The American leaders slathered on the praise for the nationalist standard-bearer just days before an election he could lose.
items.title_zh: “我爱维克托”：特朗普和万斯在匈牙利竞选中为欧尔班欢呼
items.summary_zh: 就在这位民族主义旗手可能输掉选举的几天前，美国领导人大肆赞扬他。

items.title: Ukraine Ramps Up Attacks on Russian Oil, Aiming to Curb Iran War Windfall
items.summary: As the Persian Gulf conflict boosts the oil revenue that finances Moscow’s war against Ukraine, Kyiv’s forces are striking at Russia’s ability to refine and ship its crude.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰加大对俄罗斯石油的攻击力度，旨在遏制伊朗战争带来的意外收获
items.summary_zh: 随着波斯湾冲突增加了为莫斯科对乌克兰战争提供资金的石油收入，基辅军队正在打击俄罗斯提炼和运输原油的能力。

items.title: Kim Jong-un’s Daughter Drives a Tank as Talk Accelerates Around North Korea Succession
items.summary: Images of Kim Ju-ae at the helm of the military vehicle, with her father riding on top, added to speculation that she was being groomed to succeed him as North Korea’s leader.
items.title_zh: 随着围绕朝鲜继任者的讨论加速，金正恩的女儿驾驶坦克
items.summary_zh: 金珠爱掌舵军车、她的父亲坐在车顶上的照片，加剧了人们对她正在接受培养以接替金珠爱成为朝鲜领导人的猜测。

items.title: Australia Charges Ex-Soldier With War Crimes in Afghanistan
items.summary: The suspect, charged with five counts of murder, is accused of killing or ordering the killings of unarmed civilians during the Afghan war.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚指控前阿富汗士兵犯有战争罪
items.summary_zh: 嫌疑人被指控犯有五项谋杀罪，被指控在阿富汗战争期间杀害或下令杀害手无寸铁的平民。

items.title: Stablecoin issuers get closer to U.S. federal rules with FDIC's new proposal
items.summary: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. approved a proposed rule to govern the issuers, even as the Senate continues to debate GENIUS Act details.
items.title_zh: FDIC 的新提案让稳定币发行人更接近美国联邦规则
items.summary_zh: 尽管参议院仍在辩论《天才法案》的细节，但联邦存款保险公司还是批准了一项拟议的发行人规则。

items.title: DeFi yields are crashing so hard that they can't compete with a traditional savings account
items.summary: DeFi yields have collapsed below TradFi rates, forcing investors to face higher smart contract risks for lower returns as regulation and exploits mount.
items.title_zh: DeFi 收益率大幅下跌，无法与传统储蓄账户竞争
items.summary_zh: DeFi 收益率已跌破 TradFi 利率，随着监管和漏洞的增多，迫使投资者面临更高的智能合约风险和更低的回报。

items.title: Democrats press Selig on CFTC oversight of offshore prediction market war bets
items.summary: Democrats are urging the CFTC to crack down on prediction markets that allow users to bet on certain events.
items.title_zh: 民主党人向塞利格施压，要求美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 对离岸预测市场战争赌注进行监督
items.summary_zh: 民主党人敦促美国商品期货交易委员会严厉打击允许用户对某些事件进行投注的预测市场。

items.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
items.summary: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN 是为了加速围绕人工智能的全球对话并支持独立媒体，扩大与建筑商、企业和更广泛的技术社区的对话。

items.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
items.summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.
items.title_zh: Gradient Labs 为每一位银行客户提供人工智能客户经理
items.summary_zh: Gradient Labs 使用 GPT-4.1 和 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 为 AI 代理提供支持，以低延迟和高可靠性自动化银行支持工作流程。

items.title: Liberate your OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 解放你的 OpenClaw

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可以测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: XRP leads $224 million weekly inflows into global crypto funds as bitcoin sentiment remains mixed and ether lags: CoinShares
items.summary: Global crypto funds saw $224 million worth of net inflows last week, led by XRP products with $119.6 million, per CoinShares.
items.title_zh: 由于比特币情绪依然复杂且以太坊滞后，XRP 引领全球加密货币基金每周流入 2.24 亿美元：CoinShares

items.title: Announcing the OpenAI Safety Fellowship
items.summary: A pilot program to support independent safety and alignment research and develop the next generation of talent

items.summary_zh: 支持独立安全和对准研究并培养下一代人才的试点计划

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems

items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙在年度信中提到了地缘政治、人工智能和私募市场的风险

items.title: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
items.summary: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.
items.title_zh: 中国AI落后美国竞争对手，华为2025年云计算收入下降
items.summary_zh: 当包括内部客户时，这家电信巨头表示云计算收入较一年前有所增长。

items.title: Trump-backed Republican Clay Fuller wins election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
items.summary: He will serve out the rest of Marjorie Taylor Greene's term, which ends in January 2027.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的共和党人克莱·富勒赢得选举，接替马乔里·泰勒·格林
items.summary_zh: 他将完成 Marjorie Taylor Greene 的剩余任期，该任期将于 2027 年 1 月结束。

items.title: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
items.summary: West was due to headline the festival in July but drew criticism over past antisemitic comments.
items.title_zh: 坎耶·韦斯特 (Kanye West) 被禁止前往英国后，无线音乐节被取消
items.summary_zh: 韦斯特原定于七月在该节日上担任主角，但因过去的反犹太主义言论而受到批评。

items.title: US journalist Shelly Kittleson released after kidnap in Iraq, officials say
items.summary: US officials say they are now "working to support her safe departure from Iraq".
items.title_zh: 官员称，美国记者雪莉·基特尔森在伊拉克遭绑架后获释
items.summary_zh: 美国官员表示，他们现在正在“努力支持她安全离开伊拉克”。

items.title: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
items.summary: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.
items.title_zh: 取消总统选举的计划使津巴布韦人陷入争执
items.summary_zh: 执政党公布了一项剥夺选民选举总统机会的法律草案。

items.title: Has Artemis II shown we can land on the Moon again?
items.summary: The Artemis II mission has been near flawless to date, but has the test flight shown Nasa is ready to send humans to the lunar surface?
items.title_zh: 阿耳忒弥斯二号是否表明我们可以再次登陆月球？
items.summary_zh: 迄今为止，阿耳忒弥斯二号任务几乎完美无缺，但试飞是否表明美国宇航局已准备好将人类送上月球表面？

items.title: One gunman killed and two injured in shooting at Israeli consulate in Istanbul
items.summary: No Israeli diplomats are currently in Turkey and the Istanbul consulate has been empty for the past two-and-a-half years.
items.title_zh: 以色列驻伊斯坦布尔领事馆发生枪击事件，一名枪手死亡，两人受伤
items.summary_zh: 目前没有以色列外交官在土耳其，伊斯坦布尔领事馆在过去两年半里一直空着。

items.title: WHO suspends Gaza medical evacuations after contractor killed by Israeli troops
items.summary: Israel's military says troops fired at a vehicle driven by the Palestinian because they believed it posed "an immediate threat".
items.title_zh: 承包商被以色列军队杀害后世卫组织暂停加沙医疗后送
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方表示，部队向巴勒斯坦人驾驶的一辆汽车开枪，因为他们认为这构成了“直接威胁”。

items.title: Kanye West ‘Should Never Have Been Invited,’ Starmer Says After Barring Rapper From UK
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s government blocked the artist formerly known as Kanye West from entering Britain for the three-day Wireless Festival in July.
items.title_zh: 斯塔默在禁止说唱歌手来自英国后表示，坎耶·维斯特“根本不应该被邀请”
items.summary_zh: 英国首相凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 政府禁止这位原名坎耶·韦斯特 (Kanye West) 的艺术家进入英国参加 7 月份为期三天的无线音乐节。

items.title: Shelly Kittleson, American Journalist Abducted in Iraq, Is Freed
items.summary: The journalist, Shelly Kittleson, was abducted by a militia allied with Iran and held for a week. Iraqi officials say she was freed in exchange for the release of militia members.
items.title_zh: 在伊拉克被绑架的美国记者雪莉·基特尔森获释
items.summary_zh: 这名记者雪莉·基特森 (Shelly Kittleson) 被与伊朗结盟的民兵绑架并被关押了一周。伊拉克官员称，她被释放是为了换取民兵成员的释放。

items.title: Gunman Killed in Shootout Near Israeli Consulate in Istanbul, Officials Say
items.summary: Two other armed men and two police officers were wounded in the clash, the provincial governor said.
items.title_zh: 官员称，枪手在以色列驻伊斯坦布尔领事馆附近的枪战中丧生
items.summary_zh: 省长说，另外两名武装人员和两名警察在冲突中受伤。

items.title: In Paris’s Catacombs, Can a Restoration Breathe New Life Into City’s Dead?
items.summary: For centuries, the bones of some six million people were buried in the catacombs beneath the city. Curators are trying to preserve and modernize the tunnels while maintaining the spooky ambience.
items.title_zh: 巴黎地下墓穴的修复能否为这座城市的死者带来新的生命？
items.summary_zh: 几个世纪以来，大约六百万人的尸骨被埋在城市地下的墓穴中。策展人正在努力保护隧道并使之现代化，同时保持怪异的氛围。

items.title: CZ says SBF asked for billions 'like a Bologna sandwich' as FTX collapsed
items.summary: In his new memoir, Changpeng Zhao reveals he signed the FTX letter of intent as a formality and calls Caroline Ellison's $22 floor price offer a "fatal mistake."
items.title_zh: CZ 表示，随着 FTX 崩溃，SBF 要求“像博洛尼亚三明治一样”数十亿美元
items.summary_zh: 赵长鹏在他的新回忆录中透露，他签署 FTX 意向书只是一种形式，并称 Caroline Ellison 的 22 美元底价是一个“致命错误”。

items.title: Trump-linked World Liberty faces scrutiny over ties to sanctioned network: The Times
items.summary: A deal with an Asia-based blockchain project followed recent links to individuals later sanctioned over alleged ties to a major fraud network
items.title_zh: 与特朗普有联系的世界自由组织因与受制裁网络的关系而面临审查：《泰晤士报》
items.summary_zh: 最近与一个亚洲区块链项目达成了一项协议，该项目最近与一些个人有联系，后来因涉嫌与一个主要欺诈网络有联系而受到制裁

items.title: ‘Don’t waste time with crypto': Here is what Solana Foundation's cryptic message really means
items.summary: The foundation says it is becoming a leading network for “agentic payments.”
items.title_zh: “不要在加密货币上浪费时间”：这就是 Solana 基金会神秘信息的真正含义
items.summary_zh: 该基金会表示，它正在成为“代理支付”的领先网络。

items.title: Americans’ losses to crypto scams rose to over $11 billion last year, FBI reports
items.summary: Fraud schemes grew more sophisticated and targeted larger sums than in 2024.
items.title_zh: FBI 报告称，去年美国人因加密货币诈骗造成的损失超过 110 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 与 2024 年相比，欺诈计划变得更加复杂，目标金额也更大。

items.title: Regulation by hostility: the real legacy of Biden-era crypto policy
items.summary: Thorn argues that a recent New York Times op-ed rewrites history through omission, glossing over the collateral damage caused by the previous administration.
items.title_zh: 敌意监管：拜登时代加密货币政策的真正遗产
items.summary_zh: 索恩认为，《纽约时报》最近发表的一篇专栏文章通过遗漏改写了历史，掩盖了上届政府造成的附带损害。

items.title: FDIC proposes ruleset for stablecoin issuers following GENIUS enactment
items.summary: The FDIC proposed a rule to establish a regulatory framework for stablecoin issuers and is seeking public input.
items.title_zh: GENIUS 颁布后，FDIC 为稳定币发行人提出规则集
items.summary_zh: FDIC 提出了一项为稳定币发行人建立监管框架的规则，并正在寻求公众意见。

items.title: Solana-based Stabble tells LPs to withdraw funds after identifying former North Korean employee
items.summary: Worried about a former employee with alleged ties to North Korea, Stabble told liquidity providers to withdraw funds.
items.title_zh: 总部位于 Solana 的 Stabble 在确认前朝鲜员工身份后要求有限合伙人撤回资金
items.summary_zh: 由于担心一名涉嫌与朝鲜有联系的前雇员，斯塔布尔要求流动性提供者撤回资金。

items.title: Charles Schwab examines crypto investing approaches, says even small exposure can raise risk
items.summary: Brokerage Charles Schwab said there is no "correct" allocation to crypto, and the decision depends on each investor.
items.title_zh: 查尔斯·施瓦布（Charles Schwab）研究了加密货币投资方法，表示即使是很小的风险敞口也会增加风险
items.summary_zh: 经纪公司嘉信理财 (Charles Schwab) 表示，加密货币没有“正确”的配置，决定取决于每个投资者。

items.title: CME Group to offer 24/7 crypto derivatives trading May 29, adding Avalanche and Sui contracts
items.summary: The world's largest derivatives exchange is also expanding its crypto suite to include Avalanche (AVAX) and Sui (SUI) contracts.
items.title_zh: CME 集团将于 5 月 29 日提供 24/7 加密衍生品交易，新增 Avalanche 和 Sui 合约
items.summary_zh: 全球最大的衍生品交易所也在扩展其加密套件，以包括 Avalanche (AVAX) 和 Sui (SUI) 合约。

items.title: Split Capital winds down as founder cites $100 billion crypto venture ‘last dance’, joins Plasma
items.summary: Split Capital returned outside capital as founder joins Plasma, calling crypto hedge funds "broken" after $100 billion in venture funding.
items.title_zh: Split Capital 退出，创始人称 1000 亿美元加密货币投资为“最后一支舞”，加入 Plasma
items.summary_zh: Split Capital 在创始人加入 Plasma 后返还了外部资本，称加密货币对冲基金在获得 1000 亿美元的风险投资后“破产了”。

items.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.
items.title_zh: 智能时代的产业政策
items.summary_zh: 探索我们在人工智能时代雄心勃勃、以人为本的产业政策理念——重点是随着先进智能的发展，扩大机会、共享繁荣，并建立有弹性的机构。

items.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
items.summary: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.
items.title_zh: Codex 现在为团队提供更灵活的定价
items.summary_zh: Codex 现在包括 ChatGPT 商业版和企业版的即用即付定价，为团队提供更灵活的选择来启动和扩展采用。

items.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.title_zh: 加速人工智能的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 筹集了 1220 亿美元的新资金，用于在全球范围内扩展前沿人工智能，投资下一代计算，并满足对 ChatGPT、Codex 和企业人工智能不断增长的需求。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.title_zh: 帮助救灾团队将人工智能转化为亚洲各地的行动
items.summary_zh: 亚洲救灾人工智能：与盖茨基金会合作的 OpenAI 研讨会

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: TRL v1.0: Post-Training Library Built to Move with the Field
items.title_zh: TRL v1.0：专为随场移动而构建的训练后库

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。
